title: Automatically Flag Duplicates
excerpt: We are using Monday as our CRM and want to have the system automatically flag duplicates without having to pay for an app. Having duplicate entries is really skewing our data. It will also need to run on a board with tho…

posts.author: dfrankel (Darian)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Monday as our CRM and want to have the system automatically flag duplicates without having to pay for an app. Having duplicate entries is really skewing our data. It will also need to run on a board with thousands of leads and allow us to evaluate whether or not it is really a duplicate or not.
